expo.name: HookVision NQ
expo.description: North Queensland's AI-powered barramundi fishing guide. Sonar analysis, Gulf tide predictions, species identification, live camera overlay, and Barra Brain community learning.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HookVision NQ uses the camera for live AI sonar overlay and barra recognition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HookVision NQ needs access to your photos to analyse sonar screenshots.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HookVision NQ uses your location to identify your NQ fishing spot and show nearby hotspot data.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HookVision NQ uses the microphone for AI voice narration recording.

plugins.cameraPermission: HookVision NQ needs camera access for live AI sonar overlay and barra recognition.
plugins.microphonePermission: HookVision NQ uses the microphone for AI voice narration.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HookVision NQ uses your location to identify your NQ fishing spot and show accurate hotspot data.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HookVision NQ uses your location to identify your NQ fishing spot and show accurate hotspot data.

plugins.photosPermission: HookVision NQ needs access to your photos to analyse sonar screenshots.
